nasb.text: and after him was Eleazar the son of Dodo the Ahohite, one of the three mighty men with David when they defied the Philistines who were gathered there to battle and the men of Israel had withdrawn.

esv.text: And next to him among the three mighty men was Eleazar the son of Dodo, son of Ahohi. He was with David when they defied the Philistines who were gathered there for battle, and the men of Israel withdrew.

cnv.text: 其次是亞合人朵多的兒子以利亞撒。從前非利士人在巴斯達閔聚集要爭戰，與大衛一同去向他們罵陣的三個勇士，其中之一就是以利亞撒；那時以色列人向上撤退，

ccb.text: 其次是亚合人朵多的儿子以利亚撒，他是三勇士之一。有一次，以色列人和非利士人打仗，他跟随大卫向非利士人骂阵。以色列军队都撤退了，
